headline: I-PAC Emails Staff To Pause Bengal Ops, Trinamool Says No Impact On Campaign

headline: "Would Pull My Saree, Place Hands On My Thigh": TCS Employee Details Horror
description: TCS, India's biggest private-sector employer, has clarified that it has a zero-tolerance policy towards harassment and coercion of any form, and the employees allegedly involved in sexual harassment at the Nashik office have been suspended.

headline: Opinion: Opinion | Iran Was Giving Trump The Best Deal America Ever Had. Why He Walked Away From It
description: Trump's approach to the Iran question has been irrational. He reacted to the failure at Islamabad saying that he wanted not 90% or 95% but 100% satisfaction. This is dictation, not negotiation.
